calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Contributor Onboarding — Pipeline Smoke Test (Daniel-PC)
items.notes: Three-block pipeline benchmark: env-only (pure CPU/Python), CPU training loop, GPU training loop. Reports env_steps_per_second, steps_per_second_cpu, steps_per_second_gpu for smart_assign() routing. Not a scientific experiment.
